artifact.name: nz-legislation-tool-mcp
public_contracts: MCP tool: search_legislation(query, type, status, from, to, limit, jurisdiction)
MCP tool: export_legislation(query, format, limit, jurisdiction)

requirements.description: Tool schemas, descriptions, examples, and permissions for all 7 MCP tools are documented.
Install, runtime (stdio), and environment variable (NZ_LEGISLATION_API_KEY) configuration is documented without secret values.
Release tarball (dist/ including mcp-cli.js), checksums, and source archive tagged with semver tag.
Registry metadata, package URL (npm or GitHub release), support URL, and security notes are ready.

security_gates.name: No secret values in config examples

phases.name: MCP readiness
tasks: Document tools, resources, permissions, install config, and security notes.

submission_workflow.commit_policy: Commit manifest and evidence in the owning MCP repo only.
submission_workflow.review_policy: Review tool behavior, permissions, prompt-injection notes, and install path before submission.
submission_workflow.actions_policy: Check owning repo tests, package build, and MCP smoke workflow before submission.
